testcase.name: test_create_donation_checkout_invalid_amount
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_integrations_iter4.py:80: in test_create_donation_checkout_invalid_amount assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 520 E assert 520 == 400 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_donation_checkout_invalid_package
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_integrations_iter4.py:95: in test_create_donation_checkout_invalid_package assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 520 E assert 520 == 400 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_payment_status_invalid_session

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected error status, got 520 assert 520 in [404, 500] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_integrations_iter4.py:132: in test_payment_status_invalid_session assert response.status_code in [404, 500], f"Expected error status, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected error status, got 520 E assert 520 in [404, 500] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
